ModMetaData.name: Dynamic Diplomacy Fixes + GL Compat
ModMetaData.description:
Fixes multiple bugs reported by Dynamic Diplomacy (Continued) users. Also adds Geological Landforms compatibility.
FIXES:
1. Geological Landforms terrain conflict Rejects battle tiles with extreme cliff topology (CliffAllSides, CliffValley, CliffThreeSides), cave topology, impassable hilliness, or ocean tiles. Retries up to 5 times with expanding search distance.
2. Settlement tile validation Rejects conquest events where the settlement sits on a tile that can't host a proper battle map (impassable, cave, cliff, ocean). Event retries with a different settlement instead of generating empty/broken maps.
3. Shambler/infection deadlock When pawns get infected and switch factions (e.g., become shamblers from Necroa virus), they used to keep the battle map open forever. Now they're cleaned from the faction list so the battle properly ends.
4. Hard timeout failsafe If a battle somehow runs past 7 in-game days without ending, force it to end via DD's timeout mechanism. Prevents stuck maps.
COMPATIBILITY: - Requires: Dynamic Diplomacy - Continued - Optional: Geological Landforms (terrain check falls back to vanilla hilliness only) - Works with any faction/biome mod
Logs under [DD-GL Compat] tag so you can see what's being fixed.
